cdo.name: cdo
cdo.description: Adaptive multi-agent deliberation for cdo/think/deep/debug/parliament workflows. Fractal context loop (CONTEXT→PLAN→ACT→VERIFY) at every level. Mandatory Turn 0 context gathering (skills, codebase, web). Convergence requires evidence, not just agreement. Use autoresearch/adaptive-runtime for long CDOs that need scheduler state, hard minimum turns, hard minimum agent counts, and pause/resume.

interview.name: interview
interview.description: Wizard-mode questioning skill for structured decision-making. Uses framework library (SCAMPER, First Principles, Systems Thinking, etc.) to guide users through complex decisions one question at a time.

prior-art.name: prior-art
prior-art.description: Use when you need an evidence-first provenance report from `cass`, repo docs, `.lev`, `~/.agents/diagrams`, `qmd`, `lev get`, or `rg`.

cass.name: cass
cass.description: [WHAT] Search wrapper around the external `cass` CLI for coding-agent session history.

lev-research.name: lev-research
lev-research.description: Use when any research, search, or information gathering is needed.

skill-discovery.name: skill-discovery
skill-discovery.description: [WHAT] Local skills runtime lookup over the canonical Leviathan skills inventory.

ooo-01.name: Socratic interview with ambiguity scoring (threshold 0.2)
ooo-01.description: ooo: Socratic interview with ambiguity scoring (threshold 0.2)

omo-01.name: Category routing (task classification → mode selection)
omo-01.description: omo: Category routing (task classification → mode selection)

lev-plan.name: lev-plan
lev-plan.description: Plan entity lifecycle management for `.lev/pm/plans/`, including required frontmatter, state transitions, and operational commands.

arch.name: arch
arch.description: Think and reason like a software architect. Analyze systems through quality attributes, trade-off analysis, and architectural drivers. Use for system design, tech selection, ADRs, architecture reviews, C4 descriptions, fitness functions, and PR review.

lev-cdo.name: lev-cdo
lev-cdo.description: Lev-specific CDO deliberation. Injects architecture context into cdo agent briefs. Use for architecture decisions, protocol design, module placement, and cross-cutting concerns in ~/lev.

lev-align.name: lev-align
lev-align.description: Project alignment validator. Loads .lev/validation-gates.yaml and checks current work against all applicable gates. Reports pass/fail/aspirational per gate. Integrates with /work ALIGN phase.

lev-sdlc.name: lev-sdlc
lev-sdlc.description: Thin skill documenting the `lev sdlc *` command surface, SDLC plugin profiles, and related work/review loop commands in Leviathan.

work.name: work
work.description: Use when starting any tracked work session, resuming from a handoff, planning, designing, building, researching, or closing a session

ooo-05.name: Evolutionary loop with ontology convergence (0.95 threshold)
ooo-05.description: ooo: Evolutionary loop with ontology convergence (0.95 threshold)

ooo-10.name: Drift measurement (50% goal + 30% constraint + 20% ontology)
ooo-10.description: ooo: Drift measurement (50% goal + 30% constraint + 20% ontology)

agent-browser.name: agent-browser
agent-browser.description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.

lev-workshop.name: lev-workshop
lev-workshop.description: Workshop lifecycle for building and evolving plugins, hooks, and integrations. Four phases: intake → analysis → POC → poly integration. Use when developing new lev capabilities, promoting POCs to production, or building hooks/plugins.

omx-03.name: Tmux team lifecycle (N workers, shared task list, commit ledger)
omx-03.description: omx: Tmux team lifecycle (N workers, shared task list, commit ledger)

omx-04.description: omx: Ralph persistent loop with architect verification

ooo-09.description: ooo: Event sourcing with checkpoint recovery

handoff.name: handoff
handoff.description: Session close ceremony. Writes workstream state + pbcopy resume prompt. Use when closing a session, before /clear, or when the stop hook fires.
